name: Zedrick Green
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears green felt linens, leather gauntlets, and a pair of stitched leather shoes - practical pirate attire. Armed with a steel cutlass and carries a torch for navigating dark passages.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: adventurous, loyal, seafaring, pillaging, roving
Role: Zedrick Green is a pirate who joins the crew at Dunbarrow Cove after two upgrades have been purchased for the hideout. Once all upgrades are complete, he becomes part of a three-person pillaging crew alongside Scurvy John Hoff and Yinz'r, conducting raids and bringing back plunder to enrich the Cove.
Home: Dunbarrow Cove, the pirate hideout where he lives and operates as part of the crew.
Pillaging Expeditions: Once Dunbarrow Cove is fully upgraded, Zedrick can be sent out on pillaging missions with his companions Scurvy John Hoff and Yinz'r. When dispatched, he sets off running with the crew and returns 10 days later carrying loot from their raids. These extended expeditions suggest they travel significant distances to target ships or coastal settlements, conducting the traditional pirate work of plundering and stealing before returning to their hidden base.
Daily Life: When not on pillaging expeditions, Zedrick simply wanders around Dunbarrow Cove. This suggests a life of idleness between jobs - waiting for the next opportunity to set sail, maintaining equipment, or simply passing time in the underground hideout with his fellow pirates.
Personality - The Patient Pirate: Zedrick represents the working pirate - not a captain or leader, but a reliable crew member willing to do the dangerous work of raiding. He joins the Cove operation once it's sufficiently established (two upgrades), suggesting he's attracted to successful ventures rather than risky startups. His participation in the three-person pillaging crew shows he works well with others and is trusted to bring back loot rather than absconding with it. Between expeditions, he doesn't cause trouble or seek entertainment elsewhere - he stays at the Cove, wandering and waiting for the next job. This patience and reliability make him valuable to a pirate operation that depends on crew members returning from extended missions with their plunder intact.
The Pillaging Crew: Zedrick works as part of a team with Scurvy John Hoff and Yinz'r - a diverse group (Imperial, likely Nord or Breton based on the name John Hoff, and the unusual name Yinz'r suggesting perhaps an Argonian or unique background). The fact that all three set off running together and return together after 10 days suggests strong coordination and trust among the crew members.
author: Bethesda
